args.search_query: US Steel Nippon Steel merger official press release announcement

call.purpose: Find official press releases and company announcements regarding the proposed merger between US Steel and Nippon Steel.

U.S. Steel and Japan’s Nippon Steel have announced that they have received all necessary regulatory approvals outside the United States for their proposed $14.9 billion merger.
